description: This long slim black scarf from puma is made of 80% acrylic and 20% cotton to offer maximum warmth and softness. The tight knit fabric in a double layer provides thermal protection when the weather turns cold. Your Sports-brand allegiance is subtly displayed by the puma logo picked out with silver coloured studs. Length: 180cm Width: 20cm Wash care Hand wash with like colours Do not bleach Iron low Do not tumble dry
